text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The year is ending in spectacular fashion with the
Arima Kinen, where fans crowd the racecourse for
the long-awaited sisterly showdown.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Thinking of all the strong racers she's faced until
now, Narita Brian has realized that strength is the
ability to stand back up even when you're feeling
your lowest.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She goes into the race determined to keep
moving forward with that kind of strength.
